sentences.target: J'étends le linge sur le balcon.

translations.fr: J'étends le linge sur le balcon.
translations.en: I'm hanging the laundry on the balcony.
translations.es: Tiendo la ropa en el balcón.
translations.de: Ich hänge die Wäsche auf dem Balkon auf.
translations.pt: Estou a estender a roupa na varanda.
translations.vi: Tôi đang phơi quần áo trên ban công.
translations.nl: Ik hang de was op het balkon op.
translations.hi: मैं बालकनी पर कपड़े टांग रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg henger opp klesvasken på balkongen.
translations.sv: Jag hänger upp tvätten på balkongen.
translations.da: Jeg hænger vasketøjet op på altanen.
translations.ja: ベランダに洗濯物を干しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun; 1st person singular. Elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular. Transitive, taking 'le linge' as direct object.
Definite article; masculine singular. Introduces the noun 'linge'.
Common noun; masculine singular. Direct object of 'étends'.
Preposition of location; introduces the prepositional complement 'le balcon'.
Definite article; masculine singular. Modifies 'balcon'.
Common noun; masculine singular. Object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu étends de la crème sur ton bras.
sentences.reading: /ty etɑ̃ də la kʁɛm syʁ tɔ̃ bʁa/

translations.fr: Tu étends de la crème sur ton bras.
translations.ipa: /ty etɑ̃ də la kʁɛm syʁ tɔ̃ bʁa/
translations.en: You spread cream on your arm.
translations.es: Te aplicas crema en el brazo.
translations.de: Du cremst dir den Arm ein.
translations.it: Ti spalmi la crema sul braccio.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在手臂上涂抹护肤霜。
translations.pt: Estás a passar creme no braço.
translations.vi: Bạn bôi kem lên cánh tay.
translations.nl: Je smeert crème op je arm.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी बाँह पर क्रीम लगा रहे हो.
translations.sv: Du smörjer in din arm med kräm.
translations.ro: Îți dai cu cremă pe braț.
translations.da: Du smører creme på din arm.
translations.ja: 腕にクリームを塗っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun; 2nd person singular.
Main verb; present indicative, 2nd person singular. Takes a direct object realized as a partitive NP.
Preposition forming the partitive 'de la', marking an unspecified quantity.
Definite article used in partitive construction 'de la'; feminine singular, agreeing with 'crème'.
Common noun; feminine singular. Direct object (with partitive) of 'étends'.
Preposition of location; introduces the complement 'ton bras'.
Possessive determiner; 2nd person singular, masculine singular. Modifies 'bras'.
Common noun; masculine singular. Object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On va étendre la nappe dehors.

translations.fr: On va étendre la nappe dehors.
translations.en: We're going to spread the tablecloth outside.
translations.es: Vamos a extender el mantel afuera.
translations.de: Wir werden die Tischdecke draußen ausbreiten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把桌布在外面铺开。
translations.yue: 我哋會喺出面鋪開枱布。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся расстелить скатерть на улице.
translations.pt: Vamos estender a toalha de mesa lá fora.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לפרוס את המפה בחוץ.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ trải khăn bàn ở ngoài trời.
translations.nl: We gaan het tafelkleed buiten uitspreiden.
translations.hu: Kint ki fogjuk teríteni az abroszt.
translations.hi: हम बाहर मेज़पोश बिछाने वाले हैं.
translations.el: Πρόκειται να απλώσουμε το τραπεζομάντηλο έξω.
translations.nb: Vi skal bre ut duken ute.
translations.id: Kita akan membentangkan taplak meja di luar.
translations.sv: Vi ska bre ut bordsduken utomhus.
translations.ro: O să întindem fața de masă afară.
translations.da: Vi skal brede dugen ud udenfor.
translations.ja: 外でテーブルクロスを広げるつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; often colloquial for 'we'.
Auxiliary 'aller' in present, 3rd person singular; forms the futur proche with an infinitive.
Main verb in the infinitive; complement of the auxiliary 'va' (futur proche construction).
Definite article; feminine singular. Modifies 'nappe'.
Common noun; feminine singular. Direct object of 'étendre'.
Adverb of place indicating location of the action.

sentences.target: Ils étendent les draps sur la corde.
sentences.reading: /il zetɑ̃d le dʁa syʁ la kɔʁd/

translations.fr: Ils étendent les draps sur la corde.
translations.ipa: /il zetɑ̃d le dʁa syʁ la kɔʁd/
translations.en: They hang the sheets on the clothesline.
translations.es: Tienden las sábanas en el tendedero.
translations.de: Sie hängen die Laken an die Wäscheleine.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们把床单晾在晾衣绳上。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺晾衫繩度晾床單。
translations.ru: Они развешивают простыни на бельевой верёвке.
translations.pt: Eles estendem os lençóis no varal.
translations.he: הם תולים את הסדינים על חבל הכביסה.
translations.vi: Họ phơi ga giường lên dây phơi.
translations.ar: هم يعلّقون الشراشف على حبل الغسيل.
translations.nl: Ze hangen de lakens aan de waslijn.
translations.uk: Вони розвішують простирадла на мотузці для білизни.
translations.hi: वे चादरें कपड़े की रस्सी पर टांग रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Oni wieszają prześcieradła na sznurku do prania.
translations.el: Απλώνουν τα σεντόνια στο σκοινί για ρούχα.
translations.id: Mereka menjemur seprai di tali jemuran.
translations.ro: Ei întind cearșafurile pe sfoara de rufe.
translations.ja: 物干しロープにシーツを干しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun; 3rd person plural (masculine). In context, liaison before vowel-initial 'étendent' yields [ilz].
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Definite article; plural. Modifies 'draps'.
Common noun; masculine plural. Direct object of 'étendent'.
Preposition of location; introduces 'la corde'.
Definite article; feminine singular. Modifies 'corde'.
Common noun; feminine singular. Object of the preposition 'sur'.
